## Summary

Describe the behavior changed and why it belongs in standalone DreamCycle.

## Verification

- [ ] Targeted tests cover success and failure paths.
- [ ] `python -m pytest` passes.
- [ ] `python -m ruff check .` passes.
- [ ] Public behavior and the changelog are updated when needed.
- [ ] No credential, private data, model weight, or AGPL dependency was added.
- [ ] Model improvement is supported by evaluator evidence, not training completion alone.
